nasb.text: When I gave my heart to know wisdom and to see the task which has been done on the earth (even though one should never sleep day or night),

esv.text: When I applied my heart to know wisdom, and to see the business that is done on earth, how neither day nor night do one’s eyes see sleep,

cnv.text: 我專心認識智慧，察看世上的勞碌─有人晝夜不眠─

ccb.text: 我全心去寻求智慧，观察世上所发生的事，甚至昼夜不眠，

csbs.text: 当我用心去明白智慧，去看地上所发生的事——有人昼夜不合眼不睡觉——
